name: Interlinked Time
descs: When triggering [Switch_Vibration] or [FusionVibration], trigger [VibrationExplosion] on target (once per turn per Identity)
When triggering [Switch_Vibration] or [FusionVibration], trigger [VibrationExplosion] on target (2 times per turn per Identity)
When triggering [Switch_Vibration] or [FusionVibration], trigger [VibrationExplosion] on target (3 times per turn per Identity)
